hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.py ]]; then black --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null && isort --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi

file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$file" in */completions/*|*/get-pip.py|*.lock) echo 'BLOCK: This is a protected file (generated/vendored/lock). Do not edit.' >&2; exit 2;; *ACM_SWITCHOVER_RUNBOOK.md|*.skill.md) echo 'BLOCK: This is a protected operational file (runbook/SKILL). Changes require explicit operator approval. See AGENTS.md Protected Critical Files section.' >&2; exit 2;; esac
